mapper.select: SELECT * FROM student ORDER BY student_id
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET status = #{status} WHERE student_id = #{studentId}

UPDATE student
student_name = #{studentName},
student_department = #{studentDepartment},
grade = #{grade},
politics_hour = #{politicsHour},
humanity_hour = #{humanityHour},
innovation_hour = #{innovationHour},
social_hour = #{socialHour},
password = #{password},
WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
